objective: Reduce full-page OCR timeout collapse on rasterized compact scans by adding deterministic tiled OCR fallback.
finding: The rasterized compact packet no longer collapses at OCR time. Whole-page OCR timed out on 4/5 pages, tiled fallback recovered all timed-out pages, and the run produced 6 events with 68 citations. The remaining issue is review policy / broader scan validation, not OCR zero-output collapse.
